args.body: Assignee Drew Fox flagged a personal closeness/conflict concern on this conduct archive task. Additionally, a new inbound message from the student suggests the original witness may have informally recanted — this is potentially material new information that bears on whether the closed file should be archived as-is. Recommending parallel/independent review rather than routine closeout: (1) reassign archive decision to an unconflicted reviewer, and (2) route the recantation signal to the conduct office to determine whether the case should be reopened or amended before any archival action. Hold placed pending that review.
